project.description: ZFIN-10025: unified GO load. Imports GO Central's single MOD-ID-keyed DANRE-mod GPAD file (current.geneontology.org/annotations/gpad/DANRE-mod.gpad.gz), which is intended to replace the separate Load-GAF-GOA_m, Load-GPAD-Noctua_w, and Load-GAF-FP-Inference_m loads. Captures before/after marker_go_term_evidence snapshots and a DB-level diff for BOTH organizations the unified load owns (GOA and Noctua), so its per-org delta is directly comparable to the two legacy load jobs. NOTE: the load-gpad-danre-mod Ant target ships GAF_LOAD_REPORT_ONLY=true, so this currently writes nothing to the DB (before == after, empty diffs) and only produces the load QC report. At cutover, report-only comes off (and the legacy jobs are retired).

hudson.tasks.Shell.command: set -e # BEFORE snapshot of marker_go_term_evidence for each org the unified load owns. OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GPAD-DANRE-mod_m SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad mkdir -p "$OUT" PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" for ORG in GOA Noctua; do $PSQL -v org=$ORG -v stage=tmp_danre_mgoe_before_$ORG -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_danre_mgoe_before_$ORG ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_before_$ORG.csv" echo "BEFORE $ORG rows: $(( $(wc -l < "$OUT/mgoe_before_$ORG.csv") - 1 ))" done

set -e # AFTER snapshot (post-load) + per-org database-level diff. OUT=$TARGETROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad/Load-GPAD-DANRE-mod_m SQL=$SOURCEROOT/server_apps/DB_maintenance/gafLoad PSQL="psql -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -h $PGHOST -d $DBNAME" cd $SOURCEROOT # CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY -> a single mgoe_dbdiff_<org>.xlsx workbook per org # (deletes/adds/updated_1/updated_2 sheets); intermediate CSVs removed. export CSVDIFF_XLSX_ONLY=true for ORG in GOA Noctua; do $PSQL -v org=$ORG -v stage=tmp_danre_mgoe_after_$ORG -f $SQL/snapshot_mgte.sql $PSQL -c "\copy (SELECT * FROM tmp_danre_mgoe_after_$ORG ORDER BY zdb_id) TO STDOUT CSV HEADER" > "$OUT/mgoe_after_$ORG.csv" $PSQL -c "DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_danre_mgoe_before_$ORG, tmp_danre_mgoe_after_$ORG" # key = every column except zdb_id; ignore zdb_id so a recycled id lands in # updates_ignored rather than add+delete. gradle csvDiff --args="$OUT/mgoe_dbdiff_$ORG $OUT/mgoe_before_$ORG.csv $OUT/mgoe_after_$ORG.csv marker,term,source,evidence,relation,created_by,contributed_by,protein_acc,inferred_from,annotation_extensions,noctua_model zdb_id,gene,go_id,go_term,go_aspect,relation_name" done
